title: ✔ How the Unique Archetype Works:
content:
✔ How the Unique Archetype Works:
• Only one player per class may claim this role.
• The archetype grants major buffs and restrictions.
• It cannot be changed, rerolled, or traded.
• If unclaimed, it will be randomly assigned at a key point.

✔ Examples of Unique Archetypes:
1️⃣ The Oracle – Sees one future Fate Wheel result per semester.
2️⃣ The False Prophet – Can create a fake prophecy once, deceiving the class.
3️⃣ The Executioner – May eliminate one player’s ability to act in a single class.
4️⃣ The Exiled Monarch – Gains extreme power but cannot belong to any faction.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Creates urgency for students to claim the role early.
✔ Adds another layer of strategic and thematic depth.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 520 (chunk 520/555)
